thoughts_subagentexplore_1142648846494.content: Explore subagent requires model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 which may not be available on all API keys, causing immediate API errors

facts_kody_engine_1142650377165.content: @kody-ade/engine is an external npm package, not local source code in node_modules — searching local node_modules for it will fail

facts_ship_stage_1142651811318.content: PR title derivation confirmed: ship stage reads task.md first line heading via heading.replace(/^#\s*/, '').trim() and slices to 72 chars

conventions_verification_tasks_114265319.content: Verification tasks in build stage may find nothing to implement if behavior is already correct; plan should account for this
